title: anisacantha glabra
intro: Anisacantha glabra is a plant species also known as the "São Caetano" or "Caetano", which belongs to the family Anisophyllaceae. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it a popular choice for treating various health conditions. The plant is known for its health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. Anisacantha glabra can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to treat various ailments, including respiratory issues and skin conditions.
